payload.risk_rationale: Several distinct core branches, multi-skill routing, and possible transition into stateful or externally visible execution require broader paired coverage.

payload.summary: Two blind rounds found the candidate adequate or better on six tasks, but materially incomplete on the core taxonomy task after one transferable-invariant restoration; noninferiority failed.

payload.note: Rejected after two seven-task blind paired rounds: six tasks were adequate or better, but the core taxonomy task retained a material completeness regression after the one permitted transferable-invariant restoration. Live target not changed.

payload.task_label: grilling run: playtest report divider fail-open determination and fix
payload.expected: Grilling intake requires loading any supporting skill named by the invocation; the invocation named /domain-modeling, so it should have been loaded and its own authorities followed before the ADR was written.
payload.observed: domain-modeling was never invoked. Only lines 1-60 of its SKILL.md were read via a shell command, missing its pointer to ADR-FORMAT.md and its prescribed supporting-role closing result line. The recap's required 'Supporting skill result' label then asserted the skill had been applied.
payload.consequence: The delivered recap overstated supporting-skill compliance and required an in-session correction after the user asked which skills were used. ADR-0002 was authored by imitating ADR-0001 rather than the format authority; on later inspection it conformed. No rework of the validator fix, regression test, or index edits was needed.
payload.workaround_taken: Read domain-modeling/SKILL.md lines 86-108 and ADR-FORMAT.md afterward to verify the ADR conformed and to state the gap explicitly to the user.
